description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chaise with a low-profile design, featuring a cream-colored seat and backrest contrasted by deep blue fabric on the sides and back. The chaise is supported by slender, gold-toned metal legs that add a touch of elegance and elevate the piece off the ground. The backrest and armrests are integrated into a single, continuous form, with the back gently curving at the corners. The seat is adorned with six loose cushions—four in a silvery-gray tone and two in cream—arranged symmetrically for both comfort and style. The upholstery appears to be a soft, matte fabric with subtle horizontal stitching on the seat. This piece is visually striking and would serve as a statement furniture item in an urban park, upscale sidewalk lounge, or modern neighborhood setting.
description: A modern cream and blue chaise with gold legs, integrated back and armrests, and six plush cushions in gray and cream. The design is sleek, low-profile, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue fabric end panel, slim gold legs, and the layered arrangement of cushions along the length of the seat.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid blue backrest, gold legs, and the tops of the cushions peeking above the back edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with blue end panel, gold legs, and visible cushion arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the cream seat, all six cushions, and the blue armrests with gold accents at the front corners.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a continuous, low-profile structure that wraps around the rear and sides, with a gentle curve at the corners and a smooth, unsegmented surface. It is upholstered in blue fabric and lacks any tufting or decorative cutouts.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, integrated into the continuous backrest, and are upholstered in blue fabric with gold accents at the front corners.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slim, straight, and metallic with a gold finish, evenly spaced along the base for stability and a modern aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is primarily solid cream on the seat and blue on the sides and back, with subtle horizontal stitching on the seat surface. The cushions are solid-colored in gray and cream, with no visible patterns.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are six loose cushions: four larger gray ones and two smaller cream ones, arranged symmetrically along the backrest for both comfort and decorative effect.
